name: Christopher Kubasik
background: Mr. Kubasik has served as Chair and Chief Executive Officer since June 2022. He previously served as Vice Chair, President and Chief Executive Officer from June 2021 to June 2022, and as Vice Chair, President and Chief Operating Officer from June 2019 to June 2021. Prior to the L3Harris merger, he was Chairman, President and CEO of L3 Technologies.
